summary: A Go-based modular CLI tool for migrating, detecting, and running Goss test assertions with dashboard reporting and Kubernetes support.
concerns: Documentation and roadmap updates dominate recent commits over feature work
Staged but uncommitted changes indicate possible workflow interruption
Heavy reliance on internal packages may limit external reuse
suggestions: Commit or unstage the pending change to maintain a clean working tree
Shift focus from documentation chores back to feature development
Consider extracting plugins into their own module if they grow
Add integration tests for the Kubernetes examples
